title: InfiniteSight
description: The "InfiniteSight" modpack combines breathtaking visuals with optimized performance, powered by Distant Horizons. Ideal for explorers, builders, and survival players who want to see the world stretch far into the distance.
body:
📦 InfiniteSight is a visual-performance optimized modpack built for players who want to explore Minecraft with extreme render distances using Distant Horizons. Whether you're a survivalist, builder, or explorer, this pack transforms your gameplay with ultra-realistic Patrix 256x textures, cinematic shaders, and advanced rendering — all while maintaining excellent performance.

🎮 Key Features: 
- ✅ Massive render distances with Distant Horizons. 
- ✅ Includes Bliss Shader for stunning lighting and atmosphere. 
- ✅ Visual overhaul with Patrix 256x texture pack (external download required). 
- ✅ High-performance rendering: Sodium, Iris, Entity Culling, and more. 
- ✅ Optimized to run smoothly on modern GPUs.

📌 Shader Credit: This modpack includes Bliss Shader under its open-source license. Full credit to the original author:

Bliss Shader by Xonk – https://github.com/Xonk/Bliss-Shader

Bliss is distributed under the MIT License, which permits redistribution and modification with attribution.
